payload.description: Q44 LTD will be replaced by Q44 SBS, following same route from Merrick Blvd in Jamaica to the Bronx Zoo, with fewer stops.

tool_args.label: Bus Lane on Sutphin Blvd for Q44 SBS

payload.description: Bus lane 6am-9am, 4pm-7pm on both sides of street; optional commercial loading midday if desired by BID; targeted improvements on Hillside Av under development
Riders pay with MetroCard or coins before boarding, take ticket from machine, board bus through all three doors; MTA NYCT conducts random fare payment inspections
Fall Q44 SBS launch, preceded by late summer bus lane implementation
Late Summer bus lane implementation as part of Q44 SBS project
